what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that associates attachment id att-fbf94f9a with board item item-ef580c11 in the dragnet-development channel, including an added timestamp.
observations: This file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It references a target board item using the URI board://item-ef580c11.
The added timestamp uses ISO 8601 format with microsecond precision and a UTC offset.
standouts: The target is a board:// URI rather than a file path.
The entire content is metadata with no payload or explanatory text.
The attachment is typed specifically as board_items.
conventions: Uses id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added metadata fields.
References an external entity with a custom board:// URI scheme.
Timestamp includes microsecond precision and explicit UTC offset.
concerns: The file contains no descriptive content, so its purpose is not self-evident without inference.
The meaning of attachment_type board_items and the board:// URI scheme are not defined in the file.
No author, source, or modification history is recorded.
notes: A metadata-only channel attachment record linking att-fbf94f9a to board item item-ef580c11 in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or artifact does attachment att-fbf94f9a represent?
What is the nature and content of board item item-ef580c11?
What semantics does attachment_type board_items carry?
Was this record generated automatically or manually?
Why is there no payload, description, or author metadata?
purpose_vs_actual: The file does not state an explicit purpose, but its fields imply it is meant to link an attachment to a board item; the content is consistent with that implied purpose.
intention_signals: It appears designed to create a persistent, timestamped association between an attachment identifier and a board item in a development channel, likely to support retrieval, audit, or context reconstruction.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item and the absence of any payload make this a link-only attachment record.
contribution: It contributes a concrete, timestamped attachment-to-board-item link in the dragnet-development channel that a fused system can retain as a relational fact.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory attachment file (att-fbf94f9a) of type board_items that records a link to board item item-ef580c11 in the dragnet-development channel with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To persist the association between an attachment identifier and a specific board item for later lookup or audit.
